name: Wheat Germ Yogurt Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix whole wheat flour, nonfat dry milk, salt, and undissolved yeast.
2. In a saucepan, combine water, plain yogurt, honey, molasses, and margarine. Heat to 115-120 degrees.
3. Add liquids to the dry ingredients and beat vigorously.
4. Gradually add half of the white flour and beat again.
5. Stir in wheat germ and bran. Add enough additional flour to form a soft yet manageable dough.
6. Knead for 4-5 minutes.
7. Place in a greased bowl and let rise until doubled.
8. Punch down. Shape and place in a greased 9 x 5 inch loaf pan.
9. Cover and let rise until almost doubled.
10. Brush with beaten egg and sprinkle with wheat germ.
11. Bake at 350 degrees for 25-35 minutes.
12. Cool on wire racks.
